subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the All-Wise unto him who desireth to quaff the Kawthar of life eternal from the chalice of the bounty of his Lord, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الحکیم لمن اراد ان یشرب کوثر الحیوان من کاس عطاء ربه العزیز الفضال
